title: Le petit baigneur

actors: Louis de Funès, Andréa Parisy, Franco Fabrizi
plot: Louis-Philippe Fourchaume, another typical lead-role for French comedy superstar Louis de Funès, is the dictatorial CEO of a French company which designs and produces sail yachts, and fires in yet another tantrum his designer Andr...
